ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Continued To Jun-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yona Conzevoy appeared by zoom for Elliot Katzovitz (petitioner).

Counsel stated that the 6124 presumption does not apply because the decedent had a medical condition since 2020 and wasn't able to re-call where his possessions were, that his client accessed the safe deposit box and did not find the original will, that the will would leave the entire estate to the decedent's two children who would also be the intestate heirs and that he has not heard of any objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated January 4, 1999, is admitted to probate. Elliot Katzovitz is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney, III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Continued To Jun-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christina Lewis appeared by zoom for Elliot Katzovitz.

The court stated that it seems like the original will may be in the decedent's safe deposit box and that it will sign an order for special administration for the sole purpose of allowing the petitioner to open the box and remove the original will if found. The Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to June 4, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mrs. Lewis that if the original will is found, she will need to amend the petition. Mrs. Lewis is to provide an order for special administration.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
